notes.title: SaaS Investment Series Pitch Structure
notes.content:
Here is the fundamental outline for the seed investment round deck (targeting $4.5M at $45M cap):

1. Executive Context - Stop building chatbots. Autonomy is the ultimate ceiling.
2. Proactive OS Architecture - Detail our offline-first semantic memories.
3. Market Wedge - Individual high-pacing professionals, builders & Silicon Valley founders.
4. Scalability Metrics - Current productivity score indicators and document parsed verification indexes.

Next Action: Sync this outline directly with our corporate attorney.

notes.title: Brand Design Guidelines & Typography Pairs
notes.content:
Aesthetic pairs for the modern $100M valuation look:

• Primary Display Typography: Plus Jakarta Sans for elite display tracking & modern look.
• Code & Status Indicator: JetBrains Mono for exact telemetry outputs.
• Color Pacing: Perfect slate black grids combined with translucent dark cards. High-contrast Indigo and Emerald accents.
• Density Variation: Reject spacing constants. Rhythm comes from dynamic layouts.

reminders.text: Deliver design spec draft to Silicon Valley team
Review SaaS pitch analytics scorecard and tax forms
